items.title_en: We're exiting a troubled stock after a muted quarter, while considering better options
items.title_zh: 在经历了一个低迷的季度后，我们将退出一只陷入困境的股票，同时考虑更好的选择
items.desc_en: The quarter offered some signs that management's turnaround strategy is gaining traction, but progress remains slow.
items.desc_zh: 本季度的一些迹象表明，管理层的扭亏为盈战略正在获得关注，但进展仍然缓慢。

items.title_en: Stock futures slide in first trading day of July after strong first half: Live updates
items.title_zh: 上半年表现强劲后，股票期货在 7 月第一个交易日下滑：实时更新
items.desc_en: Chip stocks slid earlier Wednesday, adding pressure to the broader market.
items.desc_zh: 芯片股周三早些时候下跌，给大盘带来了压力。

items.title_en: Private payrolls rose by 98,000 in June, less than expected, ADP reports
items.title_zh: ADP报告称，6月份私营部门就业人数增加98,000人，低于预期
items.desc_en: Companies added slightly fewer workers than forecast, with hiring targeted heavily toward healthcare-related sectors.
items.desc_zh: 公司新增员工数量略低于预期，招聘主要针对医疗保健相关行业。

items.title_en: Fed Chief Kevin Warsh set to give view on rates, central bank overhaul at ECB forum: Live updates
items.title_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什将在欧洲央行论坛上就利率和央行改革发表看法：实时更新
items.desc_en: The Fed chairman joins a panel of other central bank leaders Wednesday at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal.
items.desc_zh: 周三，美联储主席与其他央行领导人一起出席在葡萄牙辛特拉举行的欧洲央行中央银行论坛。

items.title_en: Canada will take part in Eurovision Song Contest 2027
items.title_zh: 加拿大将参加 2027 年欧洲歌唱大赛
items.desc_en: The country becomes the first new participant since Australia joined the contest in 2015.
items.desc_zh: 该国成为自澳大利亚2015年加入该竞赛以来第一个新参赛者。

items.title_en: U.S. auto industry faces more uncertainty without extension of USMCA trade deal
items.title_zh: 如果不延长USMCA贸易协议，美国汽车业将面临更多不确定性
items.desc_en: A major issue for automakers is the deal's rules of origin, which determine where a product comes from and which goods are eligible for preferential treatment.
items.desc_zh: 汽车制造商面临的一个主要问题是该协议的原产地规则，它决定了产品的来源以及哪些商品有资格获得优惠待遇。

items.title_en: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, SpaceX, Apple, Sandisk, Salesforce, Nike, Lockheed Martin & more

items.desc_zh: 以下是周三华尔街最大的呼吁。

items.title_zh: 特朗普儿童账户将于 7 月 4 日推出：家长需要了解什么
items.desc_en: Here's a breakdown of how Trump Accounts work, who qualifies for free money and when the funds can be withdrawn.
items.desc_zh: 以下详细介绍了特朗普账户的运作方式、谁有资格获得免费资金以及何时可以提取资金。

items.title_en: Kroger to buy retailer Giant Eagle in a $1.65 billion deal
items.title_zh: 克罗格将以 16.5 亿美元收购零售商 Giant Eagle
items.desc_en: Kroger said on Wednesday it would buy supermarket chain Giant Eagle ⁠in a $1.65 billion deal, as it looks to scale amid intense ​competition.
items.desc_zh: 克罗格周三表示，它将以 16.5 亿美元的价格收购连锁超市 Giant Eagle，因为该公司希望在激烈的竞争中扩大规模。

items.title_en: More than one-third of employees still work from home, new research shows
items.title_zh: 新研究显示，超过三分之一的员工仍然在家工作
items.desc_en: Despite return-to-office policies, the share of employees working from home increased in 2025 from the year before, according to the latest BLS data.
items.desc_zh: 根据劳工统计局的最新数据，尽管有重返办公室政策，但 2025 年在家工作的员工比例仍较上一年有所增加。

items.title_en: At least five killed in fire at Antwerp apartment block, say police
items.title_zh: 警方称安特卫普公寓楼起火至少五人死亡
items.desc_en: A man is seen clambering through a neighbour's window to escape black smoke in the block where more than 200 people live.
items.desc_zh: 在这个有 200 多人居住的街区，一名男子爬进邻居的窗户以躲避黑烟。

items.title_en: Bulls are betting big on this global ETF that's deep in a bear market
items.title_zh: 多头在这只深陷熊市的全球 ETF 上押下重注
items.desc_en: U.S. stocks just keep winning, with the Nasdaq closing out its best quarter since 2020. Across the globe in China, things couldn't be more different.
items.desc_zh: 美国股市继续上涨，纳斯达克指数结束了 2020 年以来最好的季度。在全球范围内的中国，情况截然不同。

items.title_en: Firefighters struggle to contain deadly Greek wildfire
items.title_zh: 消防员努力控制致命的希腊野火
items.desc_en: Over 100 firefighters are working to extinguish a fire near Thessaloniki which has claimed a life.
items.desc_zh: 超过 100 名消防员正在努力扑灭塞萨洛尼基附近的一场大火，这场大火已造成人员伤亡。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持与生俱来的公民身份，对特朗普造成打击
items.desc_en: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决是唐纳德·特朗普移民议程的重大挫折，并受到民权组织的欢迎。

items.title_en: Roof collapse kills 14 schoolchildren in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦屋顶倒塌造成14名学童死亡
items.desc_en: Two people are taken into custody after the incident at a tuition centre in the Kahna suburb of Lahore.
items.desc_zh: 事件发生后，拉合尔卡纳郊区的一个补习中心有两人被拘留。

items.title_en: Lawmaker says Alabama has America 250 fair’s ‘weakest’ display: What’s inside - AL.com
items.title_zh: 立法者称阿拉巴马州拥有 America 250 博览会“最弱”的展示：里面有什么 - AL.com
items.desc_en: Lawmaker says Alabama has America 250 fair’s ‘weakest’ display: What’s inside  AL.comCrowd size gripes, state fair troubles: The problems of an America 250 celebration tied to Trump  CNNThis surprised
items.desc_zh: 立法者表示，阿拉巴马州的美国 250 周年庆典的“最弱”展示：AL.com 内部内容 人群规模的抱怨，州博览会的麻烦：与特朗普相关的美国 250 周年庆祝活动的问题 CNN 这令人惊讶

items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers

items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.desc_zh: 初创企业正在采取新的地热能方法，但经济有效吗？

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。

items.title_en: GTA 6 - all you need to know about Rockstar's blockbuster game
items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: Scientist publishes fresh doubts over Microsoft's quantum claims
items.title_zh: 科学家对微软的量子主张提出新的质疑
items.desc_en: The tech giant has consistently stood by its Majorana chip research despite scepticism from some experts in the field.
items.desc_zh: 尽管该领域的一些专家持怀疑态度，但这家科技巨头始终坚持其马约拉纳芯片研究。

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘
items.desc_en: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。
